items.title: A month of firsts, farewells & Ferran Torres: A Fifa World Cup 2026 recap
items.summary: Three opening ceremonies, three co-hosts, a semi-final brawl, Argentina’s Martínez making 11 saves in the final — and Spain still standing at the end. An HT immersive.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Gaikwad to lead West Zone in 2026-27 domestic season-opening Duleep Trophy
items.summary: Shams Mulani to be the team's vice-captain, while Prithvi Shaw and Musheer Khan have both been included in the squad
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Ex-Villa striker Duran joins seventh club aged 22
items.summary: Former Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran joins Benfica on a season-long loan from Saudi Arabian side Al-Nassr.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
